speaker: speaker1
text: Excuse me . Do you mind if I try this on ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Not at all . The changing rooms are just this way .

speaker: speaker1
text: Thanks . It's a little tight . Do you have any in a larger size ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Sure . I'll give you the next size up . That one is small , right ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes . Also , I'm not so sure about the color .

speaker: speaker2
text: Well.It doesn't go with your skirt . I think the color itself is fine though .
